message:
feat(conformance): add traversal algorithm conformance infrastructure

Add support for DFS/BFS traversal conformance testing:
- DFSEdgesQuery, DFSPreorderNodesQuery, DFSPostorderNodesQuery operations
- BFSEdgesQuery, BFSLayersQuery operations
- TopologicalSortQuery operation (placeholder for DiGraph support)
- Expected state fields for traversal results
- Comparison logic for all traversal operations

Fixtures pending - traversal order depends on neighbor iteration order
which requires investigation to ensure Rust matches NetworkX exactly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
